attributes.description: This dashboard shows Asset Host Detection data collected by the Qualys VMDR integration.

embeddableConfig.title: Asset Hosts by Cloud Provider and Service

params.markdown:
This dashboard gives an overview of Asset Host Detection for the Qualys VMDR integration.

It shows general statistics and detections for ingested asset hosts from Qualys: total hosts, total detections, and pie charts for detection distribution by QDS severity, cloud provider, and service. It also includes tables for Top CVEs and Top Vulnerable Hosts, and a bar chart for detection status breakdown.

[**Integration Page**](/app/integrations/detail/qualys_vmdr/overview)

attributes.title: [Logs Qualys VMDR] Asset Host Detection
